attacking_style: Attacks early and aggressively on penultimate climbs (50km out), forcing isolation of rivals rather than waiting for final climb. Calculated, tactical racing prioritizing positioning over pure power.
team_tactics: Willing to mark rivals rather than collaborate with teammates, suggesting individual GC focus. Attacks designed to shed key domestiques early (Kruijswijk, Dennis type riders) and isolate leaders.
terrain_preference: Penultimate climbs where tactical positioning matters more than pure climbing power. Thrives in scenarios where bonus seconds and calculated moves trump raw climbing ability.
vulnerability: Wet descents show equipment/positioning issues. Sprint finishes against stronger finishers like Roglic when racing conservatively. Raw climbing power appears limited against pure climbers.
key_patterns: Attacks 50km out on penultimate climbs to isolate rivals early (2 instances)
Tactical bonus hunting and calculated racing compensates for climbing limitations (2 instances)
Marks rivals over following teammates, prioritizes individual over team tactics (2 instances)
Wet conditions expose mechanical/positioning vulnerabilities, particularly on descents (1 instance)
form_trajectory: neutral: showed strong tactical aggression 2022 Paris-Nice but execution issues (mechanical, sprint defeat) suggest form present but results incomplete
